## PrivaCI v0.1.0-beta.7

Security hardening for secret backend logging and CI token permissions.

### Highlights

- Secret resolver error logs redact `aws-sm://`, `azure-kv://`, and `vault://`
  identifiers (CodeQL clear-text logging fix).
- CI workflow uses explicit `permissions: contents: read`.

### Install

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:0.1.0-beta.7
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:beta    # rolling beta head

helm install privaci oci://ghcr.io/boundarylogic/charts/privaci --version 0.1.0-beta.7

pip install "privaci @ git+https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci@v0.1.0-beta.7"
```

Docs: https://boundarylogic.github.io/privaci/

Full history: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).
